summary: Frontend testing completed for Librería del Búho - Colombian bookstore with WhatsApp ordering. Tested homepage, catalog, product pages, cart functionality, and admin login. Found 3 bugs: offers filter broken, € symbol instead of COP, and admin SSR auth issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Offers checkbox label shows '≤ 15 €' instead of COP format (should be '≤ $15.000')
Offers filter uses price <= 15 but prices are in COP (15000+), so filter returns 0 results. Should be price <= 15000

integration_issues.issue: Login succeeds (token stored in localStorage) but SSR middleware doesn't pick up session from cookies, causing redirect loop back to login page
integration_issues.notes: This is a known Supabase SSR auth issue - browser client stores session in localStorage but server reads from cookies

passed_tests: Homepage loads with owl logo in hero
Homepage shows 186 títulos counter
Homepage shows price range $12.000 - $23.000 COP
Homepage has Barranquilla · Colombia chip
Homepage has 'Pedidos por WhatsApp' chip
Ticker shows correct bullets (Entrega en Barranquilla, Transferencia·Nequi·Daviplata, etc)
Cómo pedir section shows 3 clear steps
Final CTA opens WhatsApp to 573000000000 with pre-filled message
No admin link in header or footer (admin hidden)
Catalog shows books with real covers and 'SIN PORTADA' placeholder
Catalog prices in COP format ($ 16.000)
Genre filters work correctly
Search filter works
Sort dropdown works
Product page shows price in COP, stock info, WhatsApp button
Add to cart works and updates badge in header
Cart persists in localStorage
Cart page shows items with covers, prices, quantity controls
Cart form has all required fields (name, email, phone, notes)
Quick WhatsApp button available in cart
Empty cart state displays correctly
Admin /admin redirects to /admin/login (middleware working)
action_items: FIX: Change offers filter from 'price <= 15' to 'price <= 15000' in /app/frontend/src/pages/catalog.astro line 23
FIX: Change offers label from '≤ 15 €' to '≤ $15.000' in /app/frontend/src/pages/catalog.astro line 121
INVESTIGATE: Admin SSR auth - session not syncing from localStorage to cookies. May need to implement cookie-based session storage in browser client or add session sync logic
critical_code_review_comments: catalog.astro line 23: offers filter uses European price (15) instead of COP (15000)
catalog.astro line 121: hardcoded € symbol instead of using formatPrice() or COP symbol
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin login stores token in localStorage but SSR middleware reads from cookies - this is a Supabase SSR auth configuration issue. The offers filter bug is a simple fix (change 15 to 15000). All public-facing features work correctly. WhatsApp number 573000000000 is a placeholder - links generate correctly.
